name: local-web-runner
title: Build local web runner for non-technical audit workflow
description: Build a localhost-only browser workbench that lets non-technical users start Veritas audits, watch logs/status, cancel runs, inspect configuration status, and open generated artifacts while reusing the existing CLI audit engine.
creator: Hao
notes: MVP should use --serve-web, path input, subprocess CLI execution, single active run, cancel plus resume-cache guidance, local history index, config status only, and artifact navigation without rebuilding the report reader.
